node_kinds.name: GH_Enterprise
node_kinds.description: A GitHub Enterprise account that contains member organizations and enterprise-wide settings

node_kinds.name: GH_Organization
node_kinds.description: A GitHub Organization—top-level container for repositories, teams, and settings

node_kinds.name: GH_User
node_kinds.description: An individual GitHub user account

node_kinds.name: GH_EnterpriseManagedUser
node_kinds.description: An enterprise-managed GitHub account wrapper returned as EnterpriseUserAccount in enterprise member collection

node_kinds.name: GH_EnterpriseTeam
node_kinds.description: An enterprise-level team that can be assigned into one or more organizations and projected as organization teams

node_kinds.name: GH_EnterpriseRole
node_kinds.description: An enterprise-level role that can be assigned to users and enterprise teams

node_kinds.name: GH_Team
node_kinds.description: A team within an organization, grouping users for shared access and collaboration

node_kinds.name: GH_Repository
node_kinds.description: A code repository in an organization, containing files, issues, and other resources

node_kinds.name: GH_RunnerGroup
node_kinds.description: An organization-level self-hosted runner group that controls which repositories may use a set of runners

node_kinds.name: GH_Runner
node_kinds.description: A generic self-hosted runner kind shared by organization-scoped and repository-scoped runner nodes

node_kinds.name: GH_OrgRunner
node_kinds.description: A self-hosted runner registered at the organization scope for GitHub Actions jobs

node_kinds.name: GH_RepoRunner
node_kinds.description: A self-hosted runner registered directly to a repository for GitHub Actions jobs

node_kinds.name: GH_Branch
node_kinds.description: A named reference in a repository representing a line of development

node_kinds.name: GH_BranchProtectionRule
node_kinds.description: A branch protection rule that applies to one or more branches via pattern matching

node_kinds.name: GH_OrgRole
node_kinds.description: The role a user has at the organization level (e.g., admin, member)

node_kinds.name: GH_TeamRole
node_kinds.description: The role a user has within a team (e.g., maintainer, member)

node_kinds.name: GH_RepoRole
node_kinds.description: The permission granted to a user or team on a repository (e.g., admin, write, read)

node_kinds.name: GH_Workflow
node_kinds.description: A GitHub Actions workflow defined in a repository

node_kinds.name: GH_WorkflowJob
node_kinds.description: A job within a GitHub Actions workflow, with a runner, permissions, and an ordered list of steps

node_kinds.name: GH_WorkflowStep
node_kinds.description: A single step within a GitHub Actions job — either a uses: action reference or a run: shell command

node_kinds.name: GH_Environment
node_kinds.description: A GitHub Actions deployment environment with protection rules and deployment branch policies

node_kinds.name: GH_OrgSecret
node_kinds.description: An organization-level GitHub Actions secret that can be scoped to all, private, or selected repositories

node_kinds.name: GH_RepoSecret
node_kinds.description: A repository-level GitHub Actions secret accessible only to workflows in that repository

node_kinds.name: GH_EnvironmentSecret
node_kinds.description: An environment-level GitHub Actions secret scoped to a specific deployment environment

node_kinds.name: GH_OrgVariable
node_kinds.description: An organization-level GitHub Actions variable that can be scoped to all, private, or selected repositories. Unlike secrets, variable values are readable.

node_kinds.name: GH_RepoVariable
node_kinds.description: A repository-level GitHub Actions variable accessible only to workflows in that repository. Unlike secrets, variable values are readable.

node_kinds.name: GH_EnvironmentVariable
node_kinds.description: An environment-level GitHub Actions variable scoped to a specific deployment environment. Unlike secrets, variable values are readable.

node_kinds.name: GH_SecretScanningAlert
node_kinds.description: A GitHub Advanced Security alert indicating a secret was accidentally committed to a repository

node_kinds.name: GH_SamlIdentityProvider
node_kinds.description: A SAML identity provider configured for the organization, enabling SSO

node_kinds.name: GH_ExternalIdentity
node_kinds.description: An external identity from a SAML/SCIM provider linked to a GitHub user for SSO authentication

node_kinds.name: GH_App
node_kinds.description: A GitHub App definition representing the registered application. The app owner controls the private key used to generate installation tokens.

node_kinds.name: GH_AppInstallation
node_kinds.description: A GitHub App installed on the organization with specific permissions and repository access

node_kinds.name: GH_PersonalAccessToken
node_kinds.description: A fine-grained personal access token granted access to organization resources

node_kinds.name: GH_PersonalAccessTokenRequest
node_kinds.description: A pending request from an organization member to access organization resources with a fine-grained personal access token

relationship_kinds.name: GH_Contains
relationship_kinds.description: Container relationship for organizational hierarchy (org contains secrets/variables, repo contains secrets/variables, environment contains secrets/variables)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_AssignedTo
relationship_kinds.description: Structural assignment relationship showing that an enterprise team is assigned to an organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_Owns
relationship_kinds.description: Organization owns a repository

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasRole
relationship_kinds.description: User or team has a role assignment (org role, team role, or repo role)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_MemberOf
relationship_kinds.description: Team role is a member of a team, or team is a nested member of a parent team

relationship_kinds.name: GH_AddMember
relationship_kinds.description: Team role can add members to the team (maintainer privilege)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasBaseRole
relationship_kinds.description: Role inherits permissions from another role

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReadRepoContents
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can read repository contents

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteRepoContents
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can write repository contents

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteRepoPullRequests
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can create and merge pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_AdminTo
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role has admin access to the repository.

relationship_kinds.name: GH_BypassBranchProtection
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can bypass merge-gate branch protections (PR reviews, lock branch). Suppressed by enforce_admins.

relationship_kinds.name: GH_PushProtectedBranch
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can push to branches with push restrictions. Not affected by enforce_admins.

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageWebhooks
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage repository webhooks

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageDeployKeys
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage deploy keys

relationship_kinds.name: GH_DeleteAlertsCodeScanning
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can delete code scanning alerts

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ViewSecretScanningAlerts
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Role can view secret scanning alerts

relationship_kinds.name: GH_RunOrgMigration
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can run organization migrations

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageSecurityProducts
relationship_kinds.description: Repo role can manage security products

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageRepoSecurityProducts
relationship_kinds.description: Repo role can manage repo-level security products

relationship_kinds.name: GH_EditRepoProtections
relationship_kinds.description: Repo role can edit branch protection rules

relationship_kinds.name: GH_JumpMergeQueue
relationship_kinds.description: Repo role can jump the merge queue

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CreateSoloMergeQueueEntry
relationship_kinds.description: Repo role can create solo merge queue entries

relationship_kinds.name: GH_EditRepoCustomPropertiesValues
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can edit custom property values on the repository

relationship_kinds.name: GH_AddLabel
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can add labels to issues and pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_RemoveLabel
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can remove labels from issues and pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CloseIssue
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can close issues

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReopenIssue
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can reopen closed issues

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ClosePullRequest
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can close pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReopenPullRequest
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can reopen closed pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_AddAssignee
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can assign users to issues and pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_DeleteIssue
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can delete issues

relationship_kinds.name: GH_RemoveAssignee
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can remove assignees from issues and pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_RequestPrReview
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can request pull request reviews

relationship_kinds.name: GH_MarkAsDuplicate
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can mark issues or pull requests as duplicates

relationship_kinds.name: GH_SetMilestone
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can set milestones on issues and pull requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_SetIssueType
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can set issue types

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageTopics
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage repository topics

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageSettingsWiki
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage wiki settings

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageSettingsProjects
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage project settings

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageSettingsMergeTypes
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage allowed merge types

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageSettingsPages
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage GitHub Pages settings

relationship_kinds.name: GH_EditRepoMetadata
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can edit repository metadata

relationship_kinds.name: GH_SetInteractionLimits
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can set interaction limits on the repository

relationship_kinds.name: GH_SetSocialPreview
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can set the repository social preview image

relationship_kinds.name: GH_EditRepoAnnouncementBanners
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can edit repository announcement banners

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReadCodeScanning
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can read code scanning results

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteCodeScanning
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can upload code scanning results

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ViewDependabotAlerts
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can view Dependabot alerts

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ResolveDependabotAlerts
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can resolve Dependabot alerts

relationship_kinds.name: GH_DeleteDiscussion
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can delete discussions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ToggleDiscussionAnswer
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can toggle discussion answers

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ToggleDiscussionCommentMinimize
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can minimize discussion comments

relationship_kinds.name: GH_EditDiscussionCategory
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can edit discussion categories

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CreateDiscussionCategory
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can create discussion categories

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ConvertIssuesToDiscussions
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can convert issues to discussions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CloseDiscussion
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can close discussions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReopenDiscussion
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can reopen discussions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_EditCategoryOnDiscussion
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can change the category of a discussion

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageDiscussionBadges
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can manage discussion badges

relationship_kinds.name: GH_EditDiscussionComment
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can edit discussion comments

relationship_kinds.name: GH_DeleteDiscussionComment
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can delete discussion comments

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CreateTag
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can create tags and releases

relationship_kinds.name: GH_DeleteTag
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository] Repo role can delete tags and releases

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CreateRepository
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can create repositories in the organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_InviteMember
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can invite members to the organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_AddCollaborator
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can add outside collaborators

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CreateTeam
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can create teams in the organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_TransferRepository
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can transfer repositories

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ManageOrganizationWebhooks
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can manage organization webhooks

relationship_kinds.name: GH_OrgBypassCodeScanningDismissalRequests
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can bypass code scanning dismissal requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_OrgBypassSecretScanningClosureRequests
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can bypass secret scanning closure requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_OrgReviewAndManageSecretScanningBypassRequests
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can review and manage secret scanning bypass requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_OrgReviewAndManageSecretScanningClosureRequests
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can review and manage secret scanning closure requests

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReadOrganizationActionsUsageMetrics
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can read Actions usage metrics

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReadOrganizationCustomOrgRole
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can read custom org role definitions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ReadOrganizationCustomRepoRole
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can read custom repo role definitions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ResolveSecretScanningAlerts
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can resolve secret scanning alerts

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteOrganizationActionsSecrets
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can write Actions secrets

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteOrganizationActionsVariables
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can write Actions variables

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteOrganizationActionsSettings
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can write Actions settings

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteOrganizationCustomOrgRole
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can write custom org role definitions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteOrganizationCustomRepoRole
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can write custom repo role definitions

relationship_kinds.name: GH_WriteOrganizationNetworkConfigurations
relationship_kinds.description: [Organization] Org role can write network configurations

relationship_kinds.name: GH_BypassPullRequestAllowances
relationship_kinds.description: User or team can bypass pull request requirements on a branch protection rule

relationship_kinds.name: GH_RestrictionsCanPush
relationship_kinds.description: User or team is allowed to push to branches protected by this rule

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasBranch
relationship_kinds.description: Repository has this branch

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanEditProtection
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository - Computed] Repo role can modify or remove the branch protection rules governing this branch (computed from GH_EditRepoProtections + GH_ProtectedBy)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanReadSecretScanningAlert
relationship_kinds.description: [Computed] Role can read secret scanning alerts (computed from GH_ViewSecretScanningAlerts permission + GH_Contains)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ProtectedBy
relationship_kinds.description: Branch protection rule protects this branch

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasWorkflow
relationship_kinds.description: Repository has this workflow

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasEnvironment
relationship_kinds.description: Repository or branch has/can deploy to this environment

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasSecret
relationship_kinds.description: Repository or environment has access to this secret

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasVariable
relationship_kinds.description: Repository has access to this variable (org-level or repo-level)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_ValidToken
relationship_kinds.description: Secret scanning alert contains a valid, active token belonging to this user

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasSamlIdentityProvider
relationship_kinds.description: Organization has this SAML identity provider configured

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasExternalIdentity
relationship_kinds.description: SAML identity provider has this external identity

relationship_kinds.name: GH_MapsToUser
relationship_kinds.description: External identity maps to a GitHub user or identity provider user

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasPersonalAccessToken
relationship_kinds.description: User owns this personal access token that has been granted access to the organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasPersonalAccessTokenRequest
relationship_kinds.description: User has a pending personal access token request for the organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_InstalledAs
relationship_kinds.description: GitHub App is installed as this app installation on an organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanAccess
relationship_kinds.description: Personal access token or app installation can access this repository or organization

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanWriteBranch
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository - Computed] Role can push to this branch after evaluating branch protection rules, push restrictions, and bypass allowances

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanCreateBranch
relationship_kinds.description: [Repository - Computed] Role can create new branches in this repository (unprotected branches that bypass the merge gate)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanAssumeIdentity
relationship_kinds.description: Repository can assume this cloud identity via OIDC federation (Azure workload identity or AWS IAM role)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanUseRunner
relationship_kinds.description: [Actions] Repository can dispatch jobs to this self-hosted runner

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanDispatchTo
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Job can dispatch to this self-hosted runner based on runs-on label matching and repository runner access

relationship_kinds.name: GH_SyncedTo
relationship_kinds.description: External identity (Azure, Okta, PingOne, or LDAP/AD) is synced to this GitHub user via SSO/SCIM or GHES LDAP authentication

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CallsWorkflow
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Job calls a reusable workflow — GH_WorkflowJob → GH_Workflow

relationship_kinds.name: GH_CanPwnRequest
relationship_kinds.description: [Computed] Repo role can exploit a pwn-requestable workflow to execute arbitrary code with the target's secrets and permissions — GH_RepoRole → GH_Repository / GH_Branch

relationship_kinds.name: GH_DependsOn
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Job must run after another job (needs: dependency) — ordering only, not an access path

relationship_kinds.name: GH_DeploysTo
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Job deploys to a GitHub Environment — GH_WorkflowJob → GH_Environment

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasJob
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Workflow contains this job — GH_Workflow → GH_WorkflowJob

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasMember
relationship_kinds.description: Enterprise or organization has this user as a member

relationship_kinds.name: GH_HasStep
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Job contains this step — GH_WorkflowJob → GH_WorkflowStep

relationship_kinds.name: GH_UsesSecret
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Step references a secret by name — GH_WorkflowStep → GH_RepoSecret / GH_OrgSecret (name match)

relationship_kinds.name: GH_UsesVariable
relationship_kinds.description: [Workflow] Step references a variable by name — GH_WorkflowStep → GH_RepoVariable / GH_OrgVariable (name match)
